evals.prompt: Show a list of all products from the ProductEntity with their name and price. Add a delete button on each row that removes the product. Show a per-row loading indicator while a specific product is being deleted.
evals.expected_output: A list rendering useEntityGetAll, delete using useEntityDelete, with per-row loading state tracked via local useState — not a single shared isLoading.
expectations: Uses useEntityGetAll(ProductEntity) to fetch data
Uses useEntityDelete for deletion
Tracks per-row loading state with local useState<string | null>, not shared isLoading
Does not call refetch() manually after delete
Imports entity from @/product-types

evals.prompt: Build a form to create a new Task with a title and a status dropdown (todo, in-progress, done). On submit, save it to the TaskEntity and show a success toast. The form should reset after submission.
evals.expected_output: A form using useEntityCreate with correct data shape, sonner toast on success, and form reset after submission.
expectations: Uses useEntityCreate(TaskEntity)
Calls createFunction({ data: { ... } })
Shows toast.success() from sonner on success
Does not call refetch() after creation
Imports TaskEntity from @/product-types

evals.prompt: Build a user profile card that shows the current user's name, email, profile picture (with initials as fallback), and a logout button.
evals.expected_output: Uses useUser() for user data, AvatarImage with profileImageUrl, AvatarFallback with initials, logOut() from @/lib/utils.
expectations: Uses useUser() from reactSdk
Uses profileImageUrl for AvatarImage when available
Uses AvatarFallback with initials derived from firstName/lastName
Calls logOut() from @/lib/utils for the logout button
Does not try to edit user fields (UserEntity is immutable)

evals.prompt: Execute the GenerateReportAction with a date range input and show the streaming result as it comes in. Show a loading state while running and a clear button to reset.
evals.expected_output: Uses useExecuteAction with streamResult for real-time output, isLoading for state, and clear() to reset.
expectations: Uses useExecuteAction(GenerateReportAction)
Renders streamResult for real-time streaming output
Uses isLoading for loading state
Calls clear() to reset the result
Does not call the action inside onChange or other high-frequency handlers

evals.prompt: Add a file upload input that lets users upload an image. Show an upload progress bar while uploading and display the uploaded image preview when done.
evals.expected_output: Uses useFileUpload with uploadPercentage for progress and the returned URL for the preview image.
expectations: Uses useFileUpload() from reactSdk
Shows uploadPercentage for progress feedback
Stores and displays the returned URL string as an image src
Handles isLoading state to disable the input while uploading
